testsuite.name: me.owldev.adsignage.sse.DeviceMappingChangedAfterCommitTest

testcase.name: MAPPING_CHANGED is broadcast after updateAssignment commits()
MAPPING_CHANGED is broadcast after createAssignment commits()
MAPPING_CHANGED is NOT broadcast when the assignment transaction rolls back()
